headline: The ETF That Lets Reddit Drive Its Portfolio Has a Serious Problem
summary: VanEck Social Sentiment ETF (NYSEARCA:BUZZ) was built to capture stocks retail investors are actually talking about before that conversation moves prices. Using AI and natural language processing, it screens social media, news, and blogs to identify the 75 large-cap U.S. stocks generating the most positive online buzz, rebalancing monthly to stay current. Recent performance reflects ... The ETF That Lets Reddit Drive Its Portfolio Has a Serious Problem

headline: Trump sides with crypto firms in trillion-dollar battle with banks over stablecoin yield
summary: The dispute centers on whether crypto firms like Coinbase can offer yields on stablecoins, which banks warn will siphon trillions of dollars from the industry.
